bullet_points: Load all 25,856 training maps using mmap_mode='r'.
Implement a function to add noise and reconstruct 2D maps, padding them to a square 256x256 shape for kymatio compatibility.
Compute WST coefficients (J=4, L=8) for all maps and cache the full feature matrix to disk.
Calculate SNR for each coefficient (ratio of cosmological variance to nuisance-induced variance) and save the indices of the top 100 coefficients.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Compute Wavelet Scattering Transform (WST) coefficients for all training maps and perform SNR-based feature selection.

bullet_points: Load the cached 100-dimensional WST features.
Train a fully connected MLP with dropout to map WST features to the 5 physical parameters (Omega_m, S_8, T_AGN, f_0, Delta z).
Implement a dual-head architecture to output the mean vector theta_hat and diagonal covariance Sigma.
Use Huber loss and save the trained model weights.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a robust MLP regressor to predict physical parameters from WST features.

bullet_points: Obtain theta_hat for the training set using the trained MLP.
Concatenate WST features with theta_hat and train a standard GMM (K in [5, 20] components) on the joint vector.
Save the GMM parameters and the calibration statistics (mean/std of NLL on training set).
sub_tasks.sub_task: Train a GMM on the joint space of WST features and regressor outputs.

bullet_points: Implement a Leave-One-Cosmology-Out (LOCO) validation split (20% of cosmologies).
Construct a synthetic OoD set by applying non-linear pixel-level transformations to a subset of validation maps.
Compute NLL scores for InD and synthetic OoD maps, calibrate using Z-score normalization, and estimate the partial AUC.
Save validation results and calibration parameters.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Validate the model using a LOCO split and synthetic OoD data.

bullet_points: Compute WST coefficients for the 10,000 test maps using the saved selection indices.
Draw 5 samples from the predictive posterior N(theta_hat, Sigma) for each test map and compute the mean NLL and standard deviation (errorbars).
Generate diagnostic plots: ROC curve, NLL distributions (InD vs. synthetic OoD), and SNR spectrum of WST coefficients.
Format scores into submission.json and create submission.zip.
Print all key numerical results (partial AUC, GMM components, calibration stats) for the researcher.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Generate OoD scores for test maps and produce diagnostic plots.

bullet_points: Interpret the performance of the WST-based OoD detection method based on the provided numerical results and diagnostic plots.
Discuss the effectiveness of marginalizing nuisance parameters via the conditional density approach.
Summarize the validation scores and the robustness of the method against baryonic feedback variations.
Provide insights into the non-Gaussian structural anomalies detected by the model, referencing the most discriminative scattering scales.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Write the Results section of the research paper.
